title: stelis glumacea
intro: Stelis glumacea, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis glumacea include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions like eczema. Stelis glumacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
